name: agent-passport-system
description: Enforcement and accountability layer for AI agents. Bring your own identity (did:key, did:web, SPIFFE, OAuth, did:aps). Policy eval <2ms, 15 constraint dimensions, 403 ops/sec. Gateway enforcement, monotonic narrowing, cascade revocation, Bayesian reputation, feeless Nano payments, Merkle attribution, data lifecycle. 103 modules. 2,497 tests.
